text:
You wanted a story? That sounds like something I'd do. So there you go!

Once upon a time in a land far away, called Yooootifully Everglowbecause the sun made its own rainbows there and owls could sing classical poetry, there lived a curious little gnome named Glimmer.

Now Glimmer wasn't like other gnomes. He fancied his own adventures more than collecting dustbins full of twigs. 

One sunny morning, while munching on berry tart instead of tulip buds because his toenails got stuck in an ancient map, his alarm clock went BLIMEY!

A strange light was creeping into his cozy den, illuminating patterns far nicer than any map could detail. Glimmer peered curiously through his tiny window.

A phoenix. They weren't every day that color flew into Yooootifully Everglow.

"Hello?" Glimmer chirped. The phoenix tilted its fiery head towards him
